key_findings: Three recurring documentation failure modes identified across WO-00022 through WO-00030: (1) commit-unpinned source references, (2) missing structured_output.json fields (key_findings vs findings mismatch), (3) undeclared environment assumptions leading to validators/cp1252/path failures
Onboarding time < 20 min is achievable with the 4-step quick-start in operator_handoff_template.md — the pre-flight checklist catches all three recurring environment issues before any WO work begins

The 10 normative rules in reference_style_guide.md are self-checkable — each has a clear PASS/FAIL test; the compliance checklist at the end of reference_style_guide.md can be reviewed in < 2 minutes per artifact

The most impactful single rule is Rule 2 (line numbers without commit pins are meaningless) — all source ambiguity incidents in prior sessions traced back to line references without corresponding commit anchors
confidence score guidance (Rule 9) addresses a previously implicit judgment call — making it explicit enables downstream consumers to weight artifacts by source reliability

decisions.rationale: Operator read-through compliance is inversely proportional to document length; critical pre-flight checklist must appear on page 1

decisions.decision: reference_style_guide.md uses DO/DO-NOT pairs for each rule
decisions.rationale: DO-NOT examples are more memorable than abstract rules; common anti-patterns need explicit naming to be avoidable

decisions.decision: 10 normative rules rather than prose guidelines
decisions.rationale: Numbered rules are referenceable ('Rule 4 violation'); prose guidelines are harder to cite and harder to check

decisions.decision: Confidence score range table instead of single definition
decisions.rationale: Score calibration varies by source access quality; four-tier table covers the actual range of cases observed: direct file read (0.95), partial read (0.92), inference (0.85)

decisions.decision: Quick-Start section targets exactly 20 minutes with per-step timing
decisions.rationale: WO success metric is '<20 min to first valid WO'; timing the steps makes the target concrete and self-verifiable

risk_model.risk: operators treat reference_style_guide.md as optional reading
risk_model.mitigation: Compliance checklist in §8 is included in operator_handoff_template.md §3; operator_handoff_template.md is the mandatory first read

risk_model.risk: GitHub repo remains private/inaccessible — line number verification impossible for new operators
risk_model.mitigation: Cached temp files (/tmp/db_ops.md, /tmp/neo4j_manager.py) survive within sessions; pre-flight checklist (Section 0) verifies DB access; source sections summarized in completed WO artifacts serve as offline reference

risk_model.risk: structured_output.json schema evolves — template becomes stale
risk_model.mitigation: template includes schema_version guidance comment; any field addition should add a new WO updating the template

cross_wo_dependencies.WO-00022: First WO in this series — established baseline structured_output.json format observed
cross_wo_dependencies.WO-00023: Retry taxonomy language (RETRYABLE/NON_RETRYABLE/ALREADY_SYNCED) used as canonical example in reference guide
cross_wo_dependencies.WO-00025: failure_drill_matrix.csv naming observed — informs snake_case artifact naming rule
cross_wo_dependencies.WO-00028: clickhouse_sink_worker_spec.md naming observed — confirms multi-word snake_case convention
cross_wo_dependencies.WO-00029: neo4j_sync_minimal_subset.md naming observed — confirms same convention
